subject: Upgrade APPC to use common mariadb galera charts

Hi Aaron,

it getting error from dblib.properties file from /opt/onap/appc/data/properties and /opt/onap/ccsdk/data/properties, where the hostname is hardcoded  to org.onap.ccsdk.sli.jdbc.hosts=sdnctldb01. 
The jdbc connection was working earlier with the  host name sdnctldb01, I am not sure if this need to be changed to appc-dbhost value.
Please share your valuable suggestion.

Snnipt from dblib.properties

org.onap.ccsdk.sli.jdbc.hosts=sdnctldb01
org.onap.ccsdk.sli.jdbc.url=jdbc:mysql://{{.Values.config.mariadbGaleraSVCName}}.{{.Release.Namespace}}:3306/sdnctl
org.onap.ccsdk.sli.jdbc.driver=org.mariadb.jdbc.Driver

Patch Set 8: Code-Review+1

I pulled this patch down to try it myself.  As far as I could tell, the APP-C pod was connected successfully to the galera cluster.  Agree that Aaron should confirm functionality with real call flows.

Patch Set 8: Code-Review+1

> @Pramod can I ask that you please split this patch into 2?
 > You can create a new patch that is strictly for the mariadb-galera
 > chart (which we can merge immediately). And then amend this patch
 > to remove mariadb-galera changes and leave only the appc changes.
 > There is another chart that is now dependent on mariadb-galera and
 > I would like to get that in asap.

You can merge this now if you'd like.
